headline: Putin's waning popularity worries Kremlin five months ahead of Russian parliamentary elections

headline: Hunt for methane leaks reveals persistent pollution around French oil and gas sites
description: In late April, two NGOs inspected around 60 facilities and recorded leaks of the potent greenhouse gas at two-thirds of them. A high-level summit on the urgent need to reduce methane emissions was held in Paris on Monday.

headline: Tame Impala lights up Paris with Justice as surprise guests
description: The group led by Australian musician Kevin Parker delivered a brilliant performance at the Accor Arena on Sunday, May 3, blending psychedelic rock, pop and electronic music.

headline: Jacques Garcia, designer of French opulence
description: He rose to fame in the 1990s by designing the interior of Hôtel Costes in Paris. Criticized by purists, his taste for antiques and lavish style won him success with wealthy private clients and luxury hotels.

headline: Laure Ferrari, the Frenchwoman whispering in Nigel Farage's ear
description: Little-known in France, Ferrari works as an adviser to her partner Nigel Farage, leader of Reform UK, currently leading the polls in the UK.

headline: Swedish government's anti-immigrant escalation sparks backlash among population
description: With a few months to go before the September 13 elections, several new reforms are set to further toughen the conditions for migrants and refugees in the country. Minors born in Sweden, individuals who have lived there for decades and whose children are Swedish citizens now face deportation.
